title: Law Hides Among Corpses
description: Pages 6–10 focus on law hides among corpses, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the fall of Flevance and Law's escape into Doflamingo's orbit reveal how disease, war, and prejudice created his despair.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: About 100 years before the Amber lead industry even began,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everyone has a chance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The world government conducted a study into the geology of the region...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and deter- mined...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: the true nature of the mineral.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: True nature?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: poison.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Heh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A poison that has little effect on anyone or anything while it remains underground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But once dug up and handled, it begins to eat away at the human body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Blinded by the virtually limitless for- tune at their fingertips,

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: the government and the Royal Family of the Country kept this truth a secret.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: and the people of the country, unaware, continued to mine the mineral.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The terrifying thing about this whole incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: is the fact that the poison of the mineral was present in but trace amounts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: For example, let's say a single child were to have the lead begin to build up in his body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The children of that child would have shortened life spans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: and those children will grow up and have their own children,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: whose life spans will be further shortened. Generation after generation, their life spans would shrink.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Dies at 70 years

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Dies a

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Eventually a generation like law's, one that will die out before it manages to even come of age, will be born.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Negative effect on future generations

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: by the time the world had realized...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The toxicity of Amber lead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It was far too late.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Senior citizens, adults, and children alike...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: As a result of the offset in life spans, every generation broke out in illness around the same time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: People's skin and hair began to go white right before their very eyes...and their entire bodies would begin to ache.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Eventually, one after another, people began to drop dead. Doctors were powerless to stop the progression of the illness.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Is that how all the people of that kid's country died!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: How terrible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Clark

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: The true tragedy is just begin-ning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Senior!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Seeing that people across the white city were succumbing to the exact same illness,

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Flevance's neighboring countries began to think of Amber lead sickness as an epidemic.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Flevance

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: They closed every passage out of the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: They, in effect, quarantined the white city!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: The Royal Family took the aid of the world government and escaped as quick as they could.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: abandoning all their people in the pro-cess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The inhabitants of the White City, hoping for treatment and safe haven in other countries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: were treated like monsters who had escaped from their cages.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: feared and misunderstood, they were shot and killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The ugly in this world is so often simply just covered up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: After all, the pain of an illness isn't something others can feel! How utterly human.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: But Flevance didn't stay quiet for long.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Ironically enough, they had more lead bullets than they'd ever need.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: So a war finally broke out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Countries armed with the just cause of retribution...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Show no mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: And the rest went just about how you would imagine it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Are there no more children?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law, you too! Come!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: The soldiers said they'd let just the children escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Sister! My sister's about to die! I can't just leave now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Oh, Jamie is... that's right... well, we'll just have you leave on the next evac ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: It'll come again.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law! You're not coming!? Let's go together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: You can have them save Jamie afterwards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: My daddy and Mommy both died!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: But they told me to live on,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: So that's what I'm gonna do!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: See, law? There is no such thing as despair in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: A merciful hand will always reach out.

summary: Law Hides Among Corpses advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
